data.title: CME Group Reports Growth In Cryptocurrency Futures Trading
data.description: According to PANews, CME Group, a leading derivatives marketplace, released its market statistics for January 2025, revealing a total of 27.5 million contracts traded on its platform. The average daily volume (ADV) saw a year-over-year increase of 2%. In the cryptocurrency sector, CME Group reported 198,000 cryptocurrency contracts in January, with a nominal value of $13.6 billion. Notably, the average daily volume of micro Bitcoin futures contracts surged by 255% year-over-year to 84,000 contracts. Similarly, micro Ethereum futures contracts experienced a 223% increase in average daily volume, reaching 69,000 contracts.

data.title: JupiterDAO confirms Jupiter X account was stolen
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News JupiterDAO issued a statement on X to confirm that Jupiter's official X account has been stolen. Please do not click on any links or copy and paste any contract addresses.

data.title: Planet Morning News
CleanSpark: 626 BTC mined in January, total Bitcoin reserves reach 10,556
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company CleanSpark released an unaudited mining and operations update report as of January 31, 2025, which disclosed that the company's average hash rate in January was 34.76 EH/s, and mining output was 626 BTC (an average of 20.19 bitcoins per day). In January, the company sold 22.47 bitcoins at an average price of about $100,412 per bitcoin, and the current total bitcoin holdings reached 10,556. According to CleanSpark CEO and President Zach Bradford, the company's mining facilities in Tennessee, Georgia and Wyoming are still under construction.

data.title: Fed's Jefferson: Even with a 100 basis point rate cut, the Fed's interest rates are still restrictive
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Federal Reserve Vice Chairman Jefferson said that even if the interest rate is cut by 100 basis points, the Fed's interest rate is still at a restrictive level. This allows us to remain patient and observe the combined effects of policy changes. (Jinshi)

data.title: Jupiter X Account Allegedly Compromised, Suspicious Token Information Posted
data.description: According to Odaily, the Jupiter X account appears to have been compromised, leading to the posting of suspicious token information. The initial post has since been deleted. However, the account subsequently published several more posts promoting the token, including a contract address. Odaily advises users to remain vigilant and be cautious of potential risks.

data.title: Federal Reserve Vice Chair Comments On Interest Rate Levels
data.description: According to Odaily, Federal Reserve Vice Chair Jefferson stated that even with a 100 basis point rate cut, the Federal Reserve's interest rates remain at a restrictive level. This allows for patience in observing the cumulative effects of policy changes.

data.title: Tron Decentralization Gains Momentum, Will TRX Price Rally?
data.description:
The Tron network has seen a rise in activity in the past year, which could be good news for the TRX price in the long term. The network maintained steady retention of its monthly active addresses throughout 2024. The market data identifies fundamental behavior changes between users. data.title: USDC Treasury issues 50 million more USDC on Ethereum
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Whale Alert monitoring, about 5 minutes ago, USDC Treasury issued an additional 50 million USDC on the Ethereum chain.

data.title: USDC Treasury Issues 50 Million USDC on Ethereum
data.description: According to Odaily, Whale Alert has reported that approximately five minutes ago, the USDC Treasury minted 50 million USDC on the Ethereum blockchain.
